verse_text: And He said to them, 'Strive to enter through the narrow gate, for many, I say to you, will seek to enter and will not be able.

links.context: The description of the two ways was widespread in Judaism ([[DEU.30:15]]-20; Ps 1; Pr 4:17, 18; 12:28; 15:23; WSir 15:17) and in early Christian writings (Didache, Barnabas). Luke's version ([[LUK.13:24]]-30) is more eschatological, referring to the end of the age. Because we wrestle against sins and human weaknesses as well as spiritual forces of evil ([[EPH.6:12]]), entering the Kingdom is the more difficult way.
